Uri Darom
Photos • Projects • About

Projects

This Website

- 2026-05-04

An experiment in modern programming. Written with Astro.

MASLAB 2025/2026

- 2026-01-19

A full autonomous robot designed to pick up and place cans in specific goals. Won 2nd place at the MIT Mobile Autonomous Systems Lab competition.

iHDR Script

- 2024-08-07

A Pixinsight plug in designed for compressing the dynamic range of astro-images. Allows for the display of both bright and faint features while retaining contrast in both.
